contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Diagnosed why Email Agent Follow Up Open/Click columns stayed at 0 despite recipients opening emails. Traced full data flow: draft creation → tracking pixel → Edgar → Google Sheets. Discovered Edgar service account (edgar-dapp-listener@get-data-io.iam.gserviceaccount.com) lacked Editor access to Hit List spreadsheet. Simulated live tracking pixel call against gmail_message_id 19de53b44da81d4f; confirmed Drafts Open incremented from 0→1 after permission fix. Documented the architectural distinction in HIT_LIST_CREDENTIALS.md: Email Agent Drafts = live engagement source (canonical for LLM tuning), Email Agent Follow Up = frozen send-time snapshot (useful for cadence only). Cross-referenced in agentic_ai_context/WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md. go_to_market#98, agentic_ai_context#84.
- Contributor(s): Kimi, Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50
- Destination Contribution File Location: go_to_market#98
